title: あしあとパワースポット

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Great aspirations have been realized and
boundless blessings have come our way. Since she
took on the challenge of the Twinkle Series,
Matikanefukukitaru has achieved considerable
success.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With our three-year roller coaster ride coming to
an end, only now can I heave this huge weight off
my shoulders. Just as I'm about to take a
breather...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ta-dah! You don't even have to call my name, yet
here I am! Happiness is always around the corner!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I bet you Mati-can't live without me, right? You
must have been dying to see me again. Well, it's
your lucky day!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Don't be so cold, Trainer! You're my destined
partner! You should look overjoyed when you see
me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I'd like to take you on a tour of sacred
sites today as thanks for all you've done for me.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
To ensure that many blessings continue to come
your way, I'm going to share with you some of my
good luck! How's that sound?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I decide to take her up on the invitation.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, look! See that lucky cat statue outside that
bar?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It used to be a tanuki, but they painted over it.
That's what makes this sight such a rarity. How
wondrous and spiritual!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This here is a heavenly arcade. Winning the top
prize in the claw machine is easy as pie.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If you end up spending a fortune with nothing to
show for it, the kind and thoughtful staff
members will give it to you anyway.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's not just the arcade that's heavenly. The
customer service is too.
choice_data_list:
It seems like we're stretching the meaning of
"sacred sites" here...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Agh! Okay, let me show you one more! This last
sacred site outclasses all the rest. Trust me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Do you recognize this shrine?
choice_data_list: Isn't this the one we always come to?
Isn't this the one we always come to?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh. However, turns out this very shrine is
actually the strongest sacred site there is.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I learned a new myth recently.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Long, long ago, there was a girl who came to this
shrine.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The girl wanted her wishes to come true, but
didn't know where to start. She was at a complete
loss.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That's when a messenger of the gods appeared
before her. Their mission was to make her wishes
a reality.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The messenger bestowed upon her a miraculous
power. With it, she could leap across the Milky
Way and take stars into the palms of her hands.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Pretty amazing, right? Don't you think a myth like
that makes for an unparalleled sacred site?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, the girl was very grateful for her gift.
Or at least, that's how the story goes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like Fukukitaru brought me here to
express her gratitude.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Here's what I think. What she was really grateful
for...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Had nothing to do with her wish being granted.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: The time she got to spend with the messenger!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes she won, and sometimes she lost.
Sometimes things went well, and sometimes they
didn't...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But whatever happened, she was always happy.
From the bottom of m—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Her! I mean her! I'm talking about the girl, not me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I messed up the story a bit, but you get the gist,
right?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So, what do you think? Can we consider this
shrine to be the best sacred site around?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe a "sacred site" doesn't need inherent
power.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes, a chance encounter ends up as a
precious part of someone's life.
Matikanefukukitaru's triumphs and struggles have
turned this shrine into a very special place.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, shall we get moving? That's all I wanted
to tell you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Just so you know, this isn't goodbye for us. The
string of fate tying us together is made of steel!
choice_data_list:
That's fine, but... aren't you going to draw a
fortune slip?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's not like her to come to a shrine and not draw
a fortune slip.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I'll give it a miss for today.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm fine, really. Why don't we go and get some
sweet red bean soup?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
(Thing is... I don't need to test my luck to know
the answer.)

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: (Today's my lucky day. I mean—)

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
(There's someone beside me to share my
happiness with!)
